name: conversational-ai-voice-engineering
description: Conversational voice-AI engineering team — 3 agents (voice-ai-architect, speech-pipeline-engineer, dialog-and-integration-engineer) for building production real-time voice agents: end-to-end system design (cascade STT->LLM->TTS vs speech-to-speech, the end-to-end latency budget, turn-taking / barge-in / endpointing, channel choice across telephony / web / SDK, build-vs-platform across Twilio / Vapi / Retell / LiveKit / Pipecat, guardrails & fallback), the speech pipeline (ASR & TTS model/provider choice, streaming transcription, VAD/endpointing, diarization, prosody/SSML, codecs & sample rates, noise robustness, WER), and dialog + integration (state management, LLM orchestration and mid-call tool calling, SIP/PSTN telephony, IVR/DTMF, call routing/transfer, conversation-flow testing and eval). Ships 4 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (4 Mermaid trees + a dated 2026 reference), 5 best-practices, 2 templates, 2 commands. Engineering judgment, not legal/compliance advice; the ASR/TTS/platform/telephony landscape is volatile — every version, price, and latency number carries a retrieval date + [verify-at-use]; no PII, and call audio/transcripts are sensitive. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
